name: Xing Yu Chen
title: Mechanical Engineer
taglines: From CAD to chips on the shop floor
Rigor in the calculations, calluses in the shop
bio: I'm a mechanical engineering senior at Northwestern, graduating June 2026. My work lives in the loop between design and the shop floor — drafting parts in CAD, validating them with FEA or first-principles math, then machining and testing them myself. Right now I'm leading the engineering analysis on a year-long capstone with UL Solutions, designing a battery drop-certification rig that's replacing decades of manual testing.
shortBio: Mechanical engineering senior at Northwestern (June 2026), working across design, simulation, and fabrication. Currently leading engineering analysis on a UL Solutions battery-certification capstone.
